spec: DECONF/1 Stage-B harness RunSpec — the aligned-generic-store deconfound at matched budget through the identical retry topology (DRAFT registry record: registry/experiments/deconf-b.json; freeze-ready spec docs/next/design/deconf-stageb-spec.md; design DECONF.md rev-B §5). This manifest pins the harness INPUTS only; it may not change any design field or threshold. PINNING DIRECTION: the record's pins.harness_manifest is a declared PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder filled by ops amendment with the staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/deconf-b/modal_deconfb.py BEFORE any final-phase run; this file must NOT contain that sha (circular).
rider: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity (PROPOSED-ASM-1017 / ASM-1017)

prereg.registry_record: registry/experiments/deconf-b.json (DRAFT until the experiment-designer role freezes it after green mock + skeptic pass)

analysis_script.sha256: PINNED-IN-REGISTRY-RECORD (the record is authoritative; prereg-freeze re-verifies)

pins.pinSources: dqat/dadjt/dqa/dxif/kernel/molecules pins = the f2b-transfer stage-2 pins verbatim (frozen record + its d-adj-t ops amendment; PROPOSED-ASM-1106 asset reuse); gsaStoreSha256 = the A1-built GS-A store as-built, no rebuild; f2bRunnerSha256 = the A1-verified harness pin (PROPOSED-ASM-1108 — byte-identical, any edit voids the A1 lemma); f2btRunnerSha256 = the stage-2 staged-bytes runner sha (provenance-modal.json, 20260711-184448-modal); a1AuditSha256 = poc/deconf-a1/audit_a1.py at the complete-certificate commit; evalItemIdsSha256 = sha256 over one item id per '\n'-terminated line, ALL 333 resolved-gold_ext d-qa-t items in pinned rank order; bm25CorpusSha256/bm25IndexSha256 = canonical serialisations computed by stageb_runner.py (deconfb-bm25/1) and asserted at every run; queryFnSourceSha256 = sha256 over the concatenated source of query_of_item/query_from_prompt/bm25_tokens/BM25Index/render_corpus/build_retrieval (function-granularity freeze check)
pins.perItemRecordSha256: every d-qa-t item carries record_path + record_sha256; the fallback kernel arm's verifier re-hashes the canonical record file at use and fails closed (ERR_RECORD_PIN); the GS-A arm consumes the sha-pinned gs-a.jsonl projection instead (no record files at check time, by construction)
pins.adjInternalConsistency: the runner fail-closes on: summary.json labels_sha256 != sha256(labels.jsonl) (ERR_ADJ_PIN); resolved gold_ext count != summary n_ext_labelled (ERR_ADJ_COUNTS); eval-set size != the pre-registered n_items 333 (ERR_EVAL_N); item-id-list sha != evalItemIdsSha256 (ERR_EVAL_IDS); any d-qa-t id missing from labels.jsonl (ERR_LABELS_MISSING); any eval item off the DQA-type/kernel_checkable surface (ERR_ITEM_CHECKABLE) or gold_ext off the answer surface (ERR_GOLD_SURFACE)

R1.pinned_by: f2b-replicate / f2b-transfer pins.model_revisions (same revision, already cached on the kot-hf-cache volume; PROPOSED-ASM-1106)

models.R3: NO R3 ARM IN THIS DESIGN (DECONF §5.3: the efficiency non-inferiority against R3 on external gold is f2b-transfer's frozen endpoint, not re-litigated here)

eval_set.rule: EVAL SET (PROPOSED-ASM-1100) = ALL 333 resolved-gold_ext items of data/d-qa-t/items/covered.jsonl in pinned rank order (labels.jsonl gold_ext != null; the 27 unresolved-disagreement items are EXCLUDED by the issue-#9 rule). NOT the stage-2 250-prefix: Stage B is a fresh prereg and pins the full resolved set at ZERO new adjudication; the A1 complete certificate enumerated the full 360-item d-qa-t grid, so GS-A<->kernel decision concordance is measured on every eval item. The runner REFUSES on any count/id drift (ERR_EVAL_N/ERR_EVAL_IDS).
eval_set.dual_scoring: every arm cell scores EVERY eval item BOTH ways on the SAME final answers: item_correct_ext against gold_ext (every endpoint) AND item_correct_mem against the item's membership answer field (descriptive only; never an endpoint)

design_constants.note: instantiates DECONF.md rev-B §5 as sized by deconf-stageb-spec.md §1 (PROPOSED-ASM-1100); the DRAFT registry record is authoritative at freeze
design_constants.kernel_arm_fallback: PROPOSED-ASM-1105: the kernel-verify-retry arm is OMITTED iff the A1 registration + registered runner-role re-run land before/with the Stage-B freeze; otherwise the runner is launched with --kernel-arm reinstate (+~0.45 GPU-h worst case, still <= 3 total) and GS-A==kernel identity becomes a measured diagnostic of the run

engagement_gate.note: RT-7a structural gate over the gsa-verify-retry cells' verifier_engagement blocks; the runner only EMITS, the pinned analysis gates

bm25.corpus: one document per GS-A row, '<label>: <canonical_text>' from the projection's own columns (ASM-0922 serialisation; zero new prose)
bm25.zero_hit: EMPTY context, no fallback, count disclosed
bm25.cap_rule: prefix rule — docs added in score order while cumulative rendered-line tokens <= cap; stop at the first overflow

design_constants.detu_schema: deconfb-detu/1: lm.choose(item, keys, gold, seed, attempt_code) with attempt_code = attempt*(m+1) + probe_index, m=3; probe_index 0 = candidate; (attempt=0, probe_index=0) greedy argmax (IF-C attempt-0 semantics); all other codes sample via torch.Generator(SEED_BASE*10000 + seed*100 + attempt_code), SEED_BASE=20260710 (imported pinned f2bt module constant)

bootstrap.machinery: paired item-level BCa, seed-averaged per-item means (RAGC §8.4 / PROPOSED-ASM-1013)

design_constants.holm_family: four named one-sided contrasts (PROPOSED-ASM-1107): {delta_align > 0.05; bridge lift (gsa - alone) > 0.05; gr-d-lite - gr-a-lite > 0; gsa-verify-retry - gr-a-lite > 0}; the primary's verdict branch fires on its Holm-ADJUSTED p; unadjusted LCB95 + 90% TOST CI co-reported

arm_plan.retry_final_answer: last attempt (accepted or budget-exhausted); pre-declared, no post-hoc pick; identical rule for gsa-verify-retry, gr-d-lite and the fallback kernel arm (run_verify_retry semantics mirrored verbatim in the GR-D-lite loop)
arm_plan.shared_affordance: P10 IF-C constrained decoding for EVERY arm: answers by constrained selection over the pinned option set (A-D or yes/no) via sequence logprob; arms differ ONLY in evidence slot (context docs) and acceptance instrument
arm_plan.evidence_budget_parity: the 512-token cap is the allowed evidence budget binding gr-a-lite and gr-d-lite; model-alone and the answer-key-verifier arms retrieve zero tokens BY DESIGN (PROPOSED-ASM-1012 wording)
arm_plan.acceptance: gr-d-lite acceptance = RAGC frozen-menu item (i) self-consistency at pinned threshold 2/3 over m=3 probes of the arm's OWN answer prompt with the SAME retrieved docs; exact-key agreement; ONE signal, no sweeps, calibration table mandatory (plain adoption of ASM-0924/0955 — no amendment made or claimed; the rev-A gloss-self-check stays WITHDRAWN, the it['urn'] oracle leak named at source)

prompt_frames.qa_prefix: Answer the following question about the meaning of a word.
prompt_frames.frames_note: byte-identical to poc/f2b-transfer/inputs/f2bt-manifest.json prompt_frames (itself byte-identical to poc/f2b) — the instrument is carried over unchanged; the context_prefix/context_suffix/option context path IS used here by the retrieval arms; self_verify_frame retained for frame parity though no arm uses it

flop_accounting.formula: F0 section 3.3: FLOPs = 2*N_active*T_total + 2*L*T^2*d_attn per sequence; prefill and decode metered separately; T measured with the arm's own tokenizer
flop_accounting.cpu_note: CPU-side verifier/index work is metered as measured wall-clock seconds and converted at this pinned rate ONLY for the aggregate figure; wall-clock reported separately
flop_accounting.usd_note: Modal list prices for planning + $-per-query conversion; actual billing reconciled from the dashboard at run time

planning.note: dry-plan ESTIMATES only — never emitted as measurements; anchors MEASURED from the stage-2 run records (R1 option-scoring p50 ~107-109 ms at ~403 prefill tokens, A100), context factor STIPULATED (deconf-stageb-spec.md §4.1)

mock.note: SYNTHETIC mechanics-only stub LM (no torch needed); every number it produces is labelled MOCK and never a measurement; the GS-A verifier, BM25 index + retrieval + ERR_QUERY_LEAK check (over the REAL pinned items), GR-D-lite loop, dual scoring, engagement + calibration accounting, eval-set construction, flop-meter and emitter code paths are the REAL ones.

inputs_status.d-qa-t: reused at the stage-2 pins verbatim (PROPOSED-ASM-1106); the eval set is the FULL 333-item resolved-gold_ext set, not the 250-prefix
inputs_status.d-adj-t: the pinned blind-adjudication labels as-is — ZERO new adjudication
inputs_status.gs-a: poc/deconf-a1/gs-a.jsonl consumed as-built (A1 complete certificate C_dec = 1.0 over 40,576/40,576; EXPLORATORY pre-registration, its §3 replay-substitution disclosure riding every citation)
inputs_status.d-qa: ONE purpose: the original covered items the pinned d-xif labelled outputs reference (P10 gate); NO d-qa item is scored
inputs_status.d-xif: unchanged P10 gate: 500 covered real R1 outputs re-verified mechanically through this harness's extraction machinery
